_note: DECISIVE TEST v2 - fixes the two targeting bugs from v1 and DIAGNOSES the pre-clamp. (1) Pre-clamp: TargetCharId set to -1 (ANY target) so it fires on the FIRST damage apply regardless of which struct the apply path puts in rdi - this tells us whether 0x30A66F is even on a basic-attack's apply path. ForcedDebit=0 zeros that hit's HP debit. MaxWrites=1. MinHp/MaxHp explicit (1/9999). (2) Selector: MaxWrites raised 1->8 so the spurious resting/teardown selector passes (evadeType=0x00 at rest) don't exhaust it before the REAL hit render; it now survives to flip the actual landing hit (+1BE=01) to a class-evade render. Method: RELAUNCH, then make Agrias->Ramza the FIRST damaging action in the battle. Pass = Ramza takes 0 damage AND plays a Miss/dodge. If pre-clamp STILL doesn't fire (Ramza takes damage, no [PRECLAMP-REWRITE] in log) => 0x30A66F is not on this attack's apply path => pivot to a different apply hook / the HP reconciler. Safe: pre-clamp one write, selector capped at 8, single controlled attack. REQUIRES a fresh game launch.
